Disney Mickey Mouse Plush - Medium - 18 Inch
['Add an extra touch of magic fun to your little one\'s playtime with this lovely Mickey Mouse plush toy for kids. Makes a cute gift for kids and adult Mickey Mouse lovers on any occasion! Great company for kids to improve their Disney pretend play and story telling. This huggable Mickey Mouse toy is ideal for kids who love holding or hugging stuffed toys when watching Disney cartoons and movies! Let your kids explore a fantasy world along with their favorite Disney character stuffed toy! The Disney Mickey Mouse novelty plush toy is designed to be the perfect plush buddy to keep your little ones accompanied at home, at school, or when traveling. Perfect gift for every kid who loves Disney\'s adorable Mickey Mouse plush toys. Little kids who are huge fans of Mickey Mouse will be thrilled to receive this 18-inch Mickey Mouse plush doll as a birthday present, Christmas gift, or surprise gift. Children can spend endless hours of fun playing with their favorite Disney character, anytime they want, wherever they go! Perfect to help kids develop their skills in a fun and entertaining way. Includes 1 Disney Mickey Mouse Plush Toy that measures about 18" inches in height, designed for children ages 3 and older. The novelty plush figure is perfect for kids who love to play with cute stuffed toys at home, school, or on the go! The Disney Mickey Mouse plush toy is super soft, making it an ideal cuddle toy for kids. The Disney Mickey Mouse Plush Figure is made of high-quality, resistant, durable, and child friendly materials that are meant to last for a long time without damaging or breaking when used properly. The super soft plush and premium fine stitching make this the perfect item to add as bedroom decor accessory on any Disney-inspired decorated room that boys and girls will surely love!']

1950’s Headline Newsmakers Jigsaw Puzzle – Nostalgic 65th or 70th Birthday or Anniversary – Made in USA
["Flickback's Headline Newsmakers Fifties Puzzle is a Double Puzzle Challenge. The fun is only beginning once you've assembled the big colorful 500-piece jigsaw. Then its time to test your knowledge about more than 80 newsmakers associated with your decade. Identify entertainment celebrities, political figures, icons from the world of sports and many more famous faces from news events, science, and the arts. Some are easy, some may have you scratching your head. Get family and friends to help. If you're stumped, an I.D. Key is included with each puzzle to provide the names and what they were doing in the 1950s. Shrink-wrapped box. Made in USA."]

Hand-Rubbed Finish, Tenor Ukulele Neck Shape with Standard Taper
['Handmade with heavy-duty materials, time-tested styles, and innovative designs, Martin Guitar delivers unique ukuleles that any musician will love to play. With a variety of body styles and sizes, you can find the solid wood instrument that works best for your playing style and music type—rock, country, folk, bluegrass, jazz, pop, and much more. Choose from many different models, including the 2K Concert, 2K Tenor, Konter, T1K, C1K, S1, 5K, and IT IZ Tenor Ukulele. Our genuine solid wood ukuleles come in a wide variety of sizes and shapes that are specifically designed for different types of tones, volumes, and sounds. Choose from an assortment of body types: concert, tenor, and soprano. Each model has distinct features that add personality, performance, and playability to your instrument collection. The concert ukulele delivers superior projection, allowing you to reach optimal volume. Our tenor ukuleles provide the musician with deep, rich tones that are reminiscent of a bass. The soprano ukulele design offers soft melodies with less volume than either the concert or tenor ukuleles. Many of our ukuleles are also offered in a left-handed option. Our ukuleles are great options for musicians of any level, whether advanced or just starting out. Each instrument is designed for enhanced playability, a professional sound, and a timeless tone that only Martin Guitar can deliver.For nearly two centuries, Martin has been producing premium gear for musical artists across the globe. Martin’s superior ukulele, guitar, and string products remain the choice of musicians around the world for their unrivaled quality, craftsmanship, and tone. Still handmade. Still the standard. Martin instruments are the real deal—not an imitation.']
[' SOUND: The top, back, and sides of Martin’s T1K ukuleles are constructed from solid, Hawaiian koa wood. Hawaiian koa allows the ukulele to deliver a crisp, clear sound. The tenor body style complements the solid wood construction by providing soft and pleasing tones, allowing the musician to enjoy the captivating melody.', ' : The Martin T1K tenor uke is expertly handmade and boasts a solid Hawaiian koa top, back, and sides. Each instrument is finished with a satin lacquer. It has an applied dovetail neck joint, non-scalloped brace, standard taper neck, and nickel open gear tuners, making it look as captivating as it sounds.', 'PREMIUM HANDMADE UKULELE: Handmade from the highest-quality wood, each Martin ukulele is built to stand up to late-night jams, long studio sessions, outdoor playing, and plenty of strumming or picking. Each wooden ukulele is designed from high-quality materials and delivers unique designs, professional sounds, and enjoyable playing.', 'ENHANCED PLAYABILITY: In addition to Martin’s iconic tone, known worldwide, our acoustic ukuleles deliver enhanced playability that makes playing a pleasure, no matter your experience or skill level. Whether you’re playing traditional Hawaiian music, rock, country, folk, or bluegrass, these ukuleles deliver a natural playing experience that you will love.', 'MARTIN UKULELES & GUITARS: Martin’s superior ukulele, guitar, and string products remain the choice of musicians around the world for their unrivaled quality, craftsmanship, and tone. Still handmade. Still the standard. Martin instruments are the real deal—not an imitation.']

Five MTG Decks - Ready to Play - Green, Red, White, Black, Blue - Magic The Gathering - Modern Legal - 60 Card - Powerful!
['This auction is for five separate, ready-to-play MTG decks (all 5 are included with the purchase). For a complete image of the cards in each, see pictures 2-6. Each of these decks is designed to take advantage of the strengths of their respective color. These decks are remarkably powerful for the budget-friendly price (less than $20 each when you buy all 5!) The following decks are included: 1) Red burn deck: This deck casts powerful, aggressive creatures, that synergize with direct damage spells. It then includes a number of powerful burn spells to either kill your opponent\'s creatures, or do damage directly to your opponent. 2) Blue flying creature/card draw deck: This deck focuses on casting evasive, flying creatures, pumping them up through powerful effects, and it also features a huge amount of card draw to keep the flying army attacking turn after turn! 3) Green massive creature deck: This deck uses cheap mana acceleration spells to allow you to quickly cast enormous creatures! Once your massive creatures are on the battlefield, your opponent\'s army doesn\'t stand a chance. The deck also has potent card draw and good removal spells. 4) Black Knight/removal Deck: This is an aggressive deck, but it\'s true strength is the enormous value generated by nearly all the cards. It has a handful of knights with powerful second abilities that can bury your opponent in your value. It also has powerful creature kill spells. 5) White Aggro Deck: This is an insanely aggressive creature deck. The goal is to cast a huge number of small white creatures on turns 1-3, and then use one of many "anthem" abilities to give your entire army +1/+1, +2/+2, or more! Quickly overwhelm your opponent with a large army of big white creatures.']
['At MTG Decks & More we have a combined 50+ years experience building and playing decks from standard to modern to commander (and more!) at both a competitive nd casual level. We build powerful, fun decks at a competitive price. For sale is a For sale are five separate, ready-to-play MTG decks (all 5 included with the purchase!)', 'Decks include a red burn deck, green massive creature deck, black knight/removal deck, blue flying creature/card draw deck, and white aggro deck.', 'See images 2-6 for full pictures of all 5 decks.', 'These decks are remarkably powerful and cohesive, particularly for the price!', 'Modern legal and ready to play.']

XDP Recreation Fun Forever Swing Set, Gray
["The Fun Forever Set is part of the Galvanized Steel Frame Line up from XDP Recreation. \xa0 Galvanized Steel for Strength, Safety and Durability. \xa0 Galvanized is a Protective layer of Zinc on the Steel Tube that requires no maintenance, is rust free, for many years. The Fun Forever - Swing Set is a 6 station, 6 leg frame swing set that accommodates up to 8 kids. \xa0 It includes 2ea-Swings, 1ea-Stand-R-Swing, 1ea-Super Disc Swing, 1ea-See-Saw, and 1ea-6' long 3pc Wave Slide. \xa0 Also included are Foam Frame Leg Pads for Safety. \xa0 The frame legs are 2” diameter x 20-gauge wall thickness, top bar is 2” diameter x 20-gauge thickness. \xa0 Safe-Touch PVC Chain Covers on the Blow Molded Swing Seats for no pinch. \xa0 Each Swing seat accommodates one rider, the See-Saw two riders, the Super Disc Swing seats two riders and the Stand-R-Swing allows one rider to sit and swing or stand and swing. \xa0 The Wave Slide has handrails and a ‘safe landing’ for safe-stop entrance to ground. \xa0 One user at a time is recommended on the Wave Slide. Galvanized Gray Frame Color, Blue seats, a Blue Surf N Swing, a Blue Super Disc, a Blue Wave Slide and blue foam frame leg padding. \xa0 Up to 8 Kids can play on the Fun Forever - Swing Set at once with a 100lbs per seat/play maximum. \xa0 Designed and engineered for Parents ‘safe and fun’ thoughts for their Kids. \xa0 XDP's Galvanized steel frames have welded (no bolts) corner brackets for superior stability and ease of assembly. \xa0 All seats, riders and handles are made of a durable blow molded polyethylene (HDPE) material. \xa0 The 3-piece Wave Slides are HDPE (High Density Polyethylene) blow molded. \xa0 The blow molded components provide additional quality, value and performance to the XDP Recreation products. \xa0 Ease of assembly and safe assembly are important. \xa0 All XDP Recreation swing sets are ASTM and CPSIA Compliant. 5-Year on the frame."]

['This is a one-string acoustic American Canjo Company(tm) canjo (tin can banjo), handcrafted in the C. B. Gitty workshop. This little instrument looks good, is easy to play, and hand-made in the USA - all at a great price! This instrument is fretted diatonically, which means that all of the "in between" notes are left out - so it is almost impossible to hit a "wrong" note on this little gitty. It puts out a great twangy acoustic sound, perfect for practicing or back porch pickin\'. These instruments feature beautiful reclaimed softwood necks that we have lightly finished with tung oil, and are strung with unwound plain steel strings of .013" gauge. The special metal cans are labeled with a custom-designed automotive-grade vinyl label. The frets used on the neck are nickel-silver "medium" frets. Overall Length: 27 3/4"; Scale Length: 24 1/2"; Fretting: Diatonic; Can Size: 5.5" L x 2.5" Diam. Please note that these reclaimed wood necks very often will have markings left over from their previous life such as nail holes, dents and other such features.']

Traxxas Decal Sheets Stampede VXL
['Traxxas was started in 1986 with an idea for what was at that time an entirely new concept for a fully assembled, hobby-class R/C car. This new car would have all the same benefits of a hobby-class kit such as replaceable parts, hop-ups, and a high-quality component radio system, however it would be fully assembled with a colorful body, right out of the box. Traxxas coined the term "Ready-To-Run" (RTR) to describe this new class. Since a fully assembled, ready-to-run car would appeal to the entry-level beginner, a toll-free customer support line was set up from day one to service an entirely new category of hobby consumer. At first, acceptance of the RTR concept was slow because traditional R/C kits had always been unassembled. Once people realized that a Traxxas RTR had the same performance and quality as the traditional R/C kits, only that they didn\'t have to build it, the ready-to-run car was a runaway hit! A kit version would still be offered for those who still wanted to have the building experience.']

Pre-wired Piezo Pickup with Jack for Cigar Box Guitars & More - No Soldering Required!
['Here is the perfect option for builders who want to put a basic piezo pickup in their builds, but don\'t want to be bothered with the headaches that come with sourcing the individual parts, let alone soldering and wiring them. This is a pre-wired, pre-soldered piezo & jack harness that makes it simple for you. All you have to do is attach the piezo in or on your build, drill a hole and mount the jack, and you\'re done! The 12" leads give you plenty of lee-way to mount the piezo and jack where you want them as well. The jack is a Neutrik 1/4" long-shaft phone jack, with a 9.5mm threaded shaft, which is GREAT for getting through the side of thicker cigar boxes, when compared to standard 6.5mm shafts. The piezo is a high-quality 20mm Murata piezo transducer, and the lead is a two-conductor shielded cable that can help reduce feedback and interference. It doesn\'t get much easier than this, folks! These are high-quality harnesses assembled in the USA by C. B. Gitty Crafter Supply, so you know you\'re getting the good stuff.']

Just add Helium to the balloons and ENJOY. Inflate balloons same day of event. Latex balloons have an average indoor float time of 12-24 hours. Foil balloons can last multiple days if filled and stored properly. Balloons used outdoors will have a much less float time due to the elements. Foil balloons require a low pressure regulated foil inflator to inflate them. These regulators have an auto shut off pressure valve and will not over inflate them. Disposable Helium Tanks with a latex inflator Will Not properly inflate foils. If a high pressure latex inflator is used to inflate the foil balloon it can burn a hole in the balloons self sealing mechanism or tear the seam, creating a leak. Balloons can usually be properly filled at your local party supply store, florist and even some larger grocery chains will offer helium. For larger balloons or larger quantities of balloons, it may be more cost effective to rent a helium tank from a party rental company or local welding supplier.  HAZARD – Children under 8 yrs. can choke or suffocate on uninflated or broken balloons. Adult supervision required. Keep uninflated balloons from children. Discard broken balloons at once. Kid's Cozy Spider Costume
["The Spider Words Cozy isn't really the first word that comes to mind. It's not even close to the top of the list of words we think about when we see a spider. Usually, we think of things like creepy, scary, freaky, and the spawn of evil, are words that we'd more generally use to describe a spider. That makes them the perfect creature to dress up as during Halloween... but it did get us thinking. Just because normal spiders are pretty far from cozy, we could still make a cozy spider costume! We asked our costume designers to make one and they did not disappoint. They took one of the creepiest crawlies that the world has to offer, the spider, and combined it with an extra comfortable fit to create a costume that any kid can wear as they freak out their friends on Halloween night! Design & Details This exclusive, Made by Us costume for kids is a comfortable, onesie-style costume that transforms your child into a spider. The jumpsuit is made out of a soft material and fits with a zipper in the front, making it easy to change into and extra comfortable, almost like a pair of pajamas. The front also has the classic red hourglass symbol of a black widow spider. It also has 3 legs attached to each side of the jumpsuit, so your child will get the full-arachnid experience. The hood even has multiple pairs of small black eyes on top, because you can't be a spider unless you have a crazily unnatural number of eyes! It all combines for a costume that's both cozy and kind of creepy! A First for Everything Once your child wears this spider costume, you'll be able to witness the first cozy spider that you've ever seen! It's comfortable design also makes it easy for any child to wear all day or during their next costume party. - Hooded Bodysuit"]

Academie Treble Viol C-4 Pistoy Gut Medium Gauge
['Academie gut strings are used by professional and serious amateur musicians around the world. This is a single-length, 32” (80cm), medium gauge 1.26mm Pistoy gut string made with beef serosa with a natural finish and the end of the string is plain and can be knotted as necessary. Instructions on how to tie a string knot are on the back of each package. These strings are usually used on Baroque instruments by those musicians playing historical performance practice. Consequently, the gauges are set to the pitch of a-415. The tone is full and warm with a powerful fundamental and complex, pleasing upper partials. Gut strings are not intended to be used with fine tuners or string adjusters and those devices should be removed before installing the gut string on the instrument. The Pistoy string is a unique development of Daniel Larson at Gamut Strings. It is named for the town in Italy which was famous for producing the best string for basses, being "flexible, smooth, and well twisted". Our reproduction is made of three strands of gut twisted in one direction and then the three combined together by twisting in the other direction in rope fashion. When dry, the string is polished down to the specific gauge required by the instrument. The results are a very flexible string with a quick response and a full, round sound. The string is characterized by a noticeable twist and flexible feel.']
['Genuine beef gut single-length string', 'Medium gauge 1.26mm', 'Warm, powerful tone', 'Individually packaged in reclosable bag', 'Perfect for historical performance']

['Q walked into the dimly lit room, where James Bond was waiting for him. He had something special in store for the world-renowned spy - a new gadget that would make his missions easier and more enjoyable. "Good evening, 007," Q said with a twinkle in his eye. "I have something to show you." He placed a sleek, black box on the table and opened it up, revealing a USB 2.0 Powered LED Light Desk Fan Holographic Illusion Clock. "Is this some kind of joke?" Bond asked, eyebrows raised. Q grinned. "Not at all, 007. This is the latest addition to our arsenal of gadgets. It\'s a desk fan like no other - with a holographic illusion clock design that will mesmerize your enemies and keep you cool at the same time." Bond examined the fan, noting its bendable arm and LED lights that glowed green and red. "Impressive," he said. "But how does it work?" Q explained the fan\'s simple yet ingenious mechanism. "To turn it on, press and hold the ON/OFF button until the MINUTE HAND starts blinking. Then, continue to hold the button while the clock spins clock-wise quickly. Release the button just before the correct hour is set. After the hour is set, the minute hand will flash. Click the ON/OFF button to move the minute hand until you reach the exact time you need." Bond nodded, impressed with the gadget\'s functionality. "And how do I recharge it?" "It\'s powered by a USB 2.0 connection, so you can easily plug it into your computer or any other device with a USB port. " Bond smiled. "I like it. It\'s simple yet effective. And the holographic illusion clock design will come in handy in certain situations." Q chuckled. "I thought you\'d appreciate that, 007. Just make sure you keep it charged up - the batteries are non-replaceable." Bond nodded, tucking the fan into his jacket pocket. "Thanks, Q. You never disappoint." Q grinned. "I try my best, 007. Now go out there and save the world - with a cool breeze and a holographic clock by your side."']

Miles Davis/edith Piaf Forever Self-adhesive Stamp Sheet of 20 Scott 692-4693
['In 2012, the U.S. Postal Service is partnering with La Poste of France to celebrate the musical talents of Edith Piaf and Miles Davis with the Miles Davis/Edith Piaf (Forever) stamps. Music speaks an international language and these stamps celebrate a lively conversation between the U.S. and France. Edith Piaf (1915-1963) is one of the few French popular singers to become a household name in the U.S.; the great American jazz trumpeter Miles Davis (1926-1991) is beloved in France, where he performed frequently and was made a Chevalier in the Legion of Honor. He was also awarded the Grande Médaille de Vermeil by the city of Paris (the equivalent of making him an honorary citizen). The stamp art captures Piaf in a dramatic pose, typical of her emotional performances. Standing on stage in her signature black dress, the waif-like singer, who stood less than five feet tall, moved audiences to tears with her soulful delivery. Davis epitomized ?cool? style and was one of the most important musicians of his era; the stamp art depicts him in a kinetic performance pose, suggesting his extraordinary, charismatic intensity. Art director Greg Breeding designed the stamps using an undated, black-and-white photo of Piaf from the Michael Ochs Archives/Getty Images and a black-and-white photo of Davis, from 1970, by David Gahr.']
['Miles Davis (1926-1991) trumpeter, bandleader, composer', 'At the forefront of major developments in jazz: bebop, cool jazz, hard bop', 'In 2006 Miles was inducted into the Rock and Roll Hall of Fame', "Edith Piaf (1915-1963) Sang ballads: 'La Vie en rose', 'Milord', 'La Foule'", 'Mint non hinged sheet.']

Traxxas XO-1 Sway Bar Kit Includes Front and Rear Sway Bars and Linkages
['Traxxas was started in 1986 with an idea for what was at that time an entirely new concept for a fully assembled, hobby-class R/C car. This new car would have all the same benefits of a hobby-class kit such as replaceable parts, hop-ups, and a high-quality component radio system, however it would be fully assembled with a colorful body, right out of the box. Traxxas coined the term "Ready-To-Run" (RTR) to describe this new class. Since a fully assembled, ready-to-run car would appeal to the entry-level beginner, a toll-free customer support line was set up from day one to service an entirely new category of hobby consumer. At first, acceptance of the RTR concept was slow because traditional R/C kits had always been unassembled. Once people realized that a Traxxas RTR had the same performance and quality as the traditional R/C kits, only that they didn\'t have to build it, the ready-to-run car was a runaway hit! A kit version would still be offered for those who still wanted to have the building experience.']
['The number one selling name ins RTR', 'Innovative design and engineering', 'Made using only the highest quality components']

EASe (Electronic Auditory Stimulation Effect) Therapeutic Sensory Listening System
['The EASe (Electronic Auditory Stimulation effect) compact disc series is a music product that is easy to use the in the home by parents, employing the simplest of tools such as a portable compact disc player and high quality headphones. The EASe CDs contain music that has been modified by a filtering system that removes the upper frequencies for the majority of the listening time (creating a soft, somewhat muddy sound) and then randomly and transiently boosts the high frequencies to much higher than nominal levels.This transient auditory stimulation has the effect of stimulating (and in doing so, helping to organize) the auditory areas of the brain, but because it is short in duration, does not elicit a defensive response. Eventually the listener acclimates to the presence of sound and is able to perceive it more normally. This product is excellent for use with children on the Autism Spectrum, with Down Syndrome, Aspergers Syndrome, and many other sensory deprived forms of developmental delay.']
['Finally a listening program that parents can use at home.', 'Instant Calming agent for special needs children.', 'Does not require expensive headphones and equipment.', 'Helps improve school function quickly.', 'Occupational Therapist Recommended.']

CPS: Interceptor Ace: Daylight Air Defense Over Germany, 1943-44
['Interceptor Ace: Daylight Air Defense Over Germany, 1943-44 is a solitaire, tactical level game which places you in command of a German fighter during World War II. Each turn consists of several days, during which a combat mission will be flown from one of many bases in Europe, attempting to intercept incoming American Bombers. Interceptor Ace is based on the popular, action-packed Nightfighter Ace game system by Gregory M. Smith with a strong narrative around the pilot as you look to increase your prestige, earn skills, and rise in rank through promotion and receive awards. The objective of the game is to conduct numerous sorties in the role of a German interceptor pilot and rack up kills. Pilots may use the experience gained to improve their odds of success by purchasing skills. As their prestige increases, they may request a transfer to other fighter bases in an attempt to get "closer to the action" or request a newer type of fighter. Awards and ace status help to narrate the player\'s eventual goal – to become the top “Viermot” killer of the war. The system is packed with rich technical detail but without the complexity to capture the key historical facets of the day bombing campaign over Germany. In terms of fighters alone, there are 30 aircraft models available to pilot.']

Hohner Old Standby Harmonica Key of C
['Hohner Harmonica "Old Standby". These popular beginners harmonicas are also affordably priced. Fine construction and tone with heavy plated covers and sturdy boxes. Diatonic Harmonicas The reeds of Diatonic Harmonicas produce the notes of the scale to which they are tuned. For example, a diatonic harmonica tuned to the key of C would produce the natural notes of the C scale without sharps and flats (picture the white keys on a piano, without the black keys). Each hole has two reeds; one plays when breath is exhaled (blow) and the other when inhaled (draw). The individual reeds are each tuned to play a different note on the scale.']

["Seymour Duncan's own love affair with the Fender Mustang began in the '60s, and his Antiquity II Myth Mustang pickups reflect a deep love of this classic electric guitar. Antiquity II Myth Mustang single-coil pickups feature custom-wound heavy formvar wire and flat Alnico 5 magnets that the Seymour Duncan Custom Shop age to perfection, resulting in smooth and mellow overtones that complement the Mustang tone's honky mids and sparkling highs. They're an extremely popular mod among GearNuts guitarists who want extra sustain and natural dynamics. Top it off with vintage-accurate aesthetics and details like cloth push-back wiring, and this Seymour Duncan Antiquity II Myth Mustang pickup is everything a die-hard Mustang player could ask for."]
